---
title: "Wavefield Propagation"
subtitle: "Forward Wavefield Through a Velocity Model"
author: "Felix J. Herrmann"
institute: "Schools of EAS, CSE, ECE — Georgia Institute of Technology"
date: March 4, 2026
footer: "[🔗 https://flexie.github.io/EAS-88-3-FH](https://flexie.github.io/EAS-8803-FH/)"
logo: "../images/logo.png"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: solarized
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    smaller: false
    scrollable: false
    center: true
    transition: slide
    html-math-method: mathjax
    fig-align: center
    code-fold: true
    highlight-style: github
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

## Velocity Model & Shot Gather

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Shot gather](wavefield_animation_simple/shot_gather.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 1

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t85.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 2

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t120.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 3

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t155.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 4

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t190.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 5

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t225.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 6

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t260.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 7

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t295.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 8

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t330.png)
:::
::::

---

## Forward Wavefield - Step 9

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Velocity model](wavefield_animation_simple/velocity_target.png)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Forward wavefield](wavefield_animation_simple/forward_u_t365.png)
:::
::::
